target._comment: lines are 1-indexed and refer to ground-truth (base_commit) source

task._obs_patch_comment: Applying obs_patch to base_commit produces the stripped code shown to the LLM. Generated by tools/build_instances.py.
task._context_files_comment: Additional read-only files passed to the LLM as context (e.g. an init file). Empty for pure function-level instances.

obs_sites.neighborhood: at handler entry, after argument unpacking
after successful redis HSET / DB insert
in the error-return branch of redis HSET / DB call

ground_truth._obs_sites_comment: Filled by hand during the 10-instance hand-pilot, then validated against tools/extract output.

metadata.notes: EXAMPLE / TEMPLATE only — fields prefixed TODO_ must be replaced for a real instance.
